data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of suggesting alternatives.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that the system can suggest alternatives when a proposed time is not suitable for a participant. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations that this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for the system to suggest alternatives, but there is no direct evidence that this functionality has been tested or confirmed, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system suggests alternatives when a proposed time is unsuitable.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement of suggesting alternatives.
